note: Passive group registry for the app-dashboard grouping system. A GROUP is a cross-cutting lens over repo assets; membership is NON-EXCLUSIVE (an asset may belong to many groups). Two membership sources: (1) explicit `members` here — for curated links and non-app assets like registries + docs; (2) apps that self-tag via a `groups:[]` field in app-dashboard/source/data.js APP_META (wired in a later pass). Group homepages are GENERATED filtered renders of this file — add a member row (or tag an app) and every view updates itself, no render edit. Home: app-dashboard/groups/. Spec: the App Grouping System decision log.

memberKinds.js: JS data module used as a manifest
memberKinds.md: markdown coordination file (queue / board / thread) agents read+write
memberKinds.app: a hosted app folder in this repo

groups.label: Indexes & Registries
groups.blurb: The machine-readable manifests and coordination files agents parse throughout their workflows.

members.label: registry.json
members.sub: Canonical tool + agent manifest (the runtime layer)

members.label: themes / _index.json
members.sub: Theme token contract + role map + theme registry

members.label: themes / _themes.json
members.sub: Theme join table — the 4-vector name families

members.label: app-dashboard / data.js
members.sub: App manifest (APP_META) the dashboard renders from

members.label: session-board.md
members.sub: Live agent presence (who is working now)
